commentaries.author: Aquinas Study Bible
commentaries.content: all these fruits brought forth are the good works of the saints. (Alcuin)

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Cinnamon. Very rare, Exodus xxx. 23.
Libanus, or "incense. "(Hebrew)
